summary: Exceptional soundboard capture of the Warfield acoustic set, highlighted by a crystal‑clear El Paso and flawless acoustic performances.
review: The recording is an outstanding SBD source with crisp mix balance and only minor technical glitches. The October‑13‑1980 acoustic show shines – Jerry’s guitar comes through in perfect focus and the band delivers tight vocals, sweet harmonies and inspired renditions of El Paso, Bird Song, Jack O’Roe, Race Is On, Deep Elem and Ripple. Fans consistently describe it as one of the best 1980 acoustic outings.

ai_rating.rationale: Nearly all reviewers give 4‑5 stars, praising both the superb soundboard quality and the tight, inspired acoustic performance.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crystal‑clear mix with perfect levels; a few reviewers note minor tech glitches but overall the audio is pristine.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Tight, well‑sequenced acoustic set that flows smoothly and maintains a strong connection with the audience.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Guitar tone is clear and front‑center on the right channel; solos flow effortlessly.
